scripts.start:gateway: pnpm stop && pnpm -C packages/mcp-probe-kit build && pnpm -C packages/mcp-gateway build && pnpm -C packages/mcp-gateway start
scripts.start:gateway:pm2: pm2 stop mcp-gateway || true && pnpm -C packages/mcp-probe-kit build && pnpm -C packages/mcp-gateway build && pm2 start dist/index.js --name mcp-gateway --cwd packages/mcp-gateway
scripts.docker:build: TAG=${TAG:-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)} && docker build -f Dockerfile -t mcp-gateway:$TAG . && echo "Built image: mcp-gateway:$TAG"
scripts.docker:build:mirror: TAG=${TAG:-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)} && docker build -f Dockerfile -t mcp-gateway:$TAG --build-arg NPM_REGISTRY=https://registry.npmmirror.com . && echo "Built image: mcp-gateway:$TAG"
